definitions: 少报；低报（如少报价值、收入、数字等）

examples.text: and redistribute it to landless farmers. The Arbenz government offered to pay a price based on tax records— where United Fruit had underreported the value of the land. El Pulpo was not happy. The company launched propaganda campaigns against Arbenz
examples.explanation: 这里的 underreported the value of the land 表示“少报了土地价值”。也就是联合水果公司在税务记录中把土地价格报得偏低，因此政府按税务记录给出的补偿价格也较低。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
